name: vinuni_scholarships
description: VinUni scholarship facts, verified 2026-06-24 from v2-indexed authoritative pages, NOT bot output. SCORED = cases that pass on v2+D9: merit-based scholarships cover 50%-100% of tuition; the Vingroup Science & Technology Scholarship (graduate) is full-cost. The all-students 35% tuition-subsidy cases were moved to golden_targets/admissions_financial_retrieval.json (the recovered scholarship page is out-ranked by the policy tariff → bot says 50% / hedges). PhD-CS full scholarship already in expansion.json.

cases.question: What range of tuition do VinUni's merit-based scholarships cover?
What does the Vingroup Science and Technology Scholarship cover for graduate students?
What percentage tuition subsidy do all VinUni undergraduate students receive?
Tất cả sinh viên đại học VinUni được hỗ trợ học phí (trợ cấp) bao nhiêu phần trăm?
